strings.description: We focus on the creation and use of open data to solve social, economic, and community challenges.

strings.name: Student's Geographical Association
strings.description: YouthMappers chapter at Fourah Bay College
strings.extendedDescription: The Student's Geographical Association- YouthMappers is an association of Fourah Bay College Students with the common goals of mapping out vulnerable places in Sierra Leone and the world at large for relief and other beneficial purposes,carry out Research and other educative endeavors. The chapter consists of young people with great ideas, development oriented with the capacity to relate with each other, comprehend and implement sustainable developmental projects as a team.

strings.name: Njala Freetown YouthMappers
strings.description: YouthMappers chapter at Njala University, Freetown Campus
strings.extendedDescription: We are students of Njala University Freetown Campus, studying Information Technology under the department of Physics and Computer Science. and we are located at Henry Street Freetown, Sierra Leone.
